response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'Carbonated Love' from the on-screen text. 2. Performed a web search for '"Carbonated Love" IRyS lyrics' to verify the song title and artist. 3. Confirmed the song is in English. 4. Extracted lyrics from the search results, ensuring they match the lyrics displayed in the video. 5. Mapped the video structure to identify the singing segment (00:00 - 02:17) and the subsequent dialogue/driving segment (02:18 - 04:58).
response.global_summary: A 3D VTuber performance featuring IRyS and other Hololive VTubers dancing to the song 'Carbonated Love' by IRyS, followed by a dialogue and driving sequence with chat overlay interactions.

scenes.description: The three characters dance and perform the song 'Carbonated Love' with on-screen lyric text.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Let's go
One, two, three, four
Lost hope in love, I thought I'd never understand
Couldn't help it when you took my hand
Roads I ignored before, you left me wanting more
Destroyed everything just to get a bit ahead
Neon lights fly by, is it fake or reality?
With the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast, only us, make it last
Till the sun's up
'Nother shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach a line, mark the end, but we'll
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up
And don't look back again
Carbonated love
Took a bet on love, it's better than I coulda dreamed
Look at what we've done, we're too extreme
Pour me your favorite drink
So much until we sink
Down to the bottom, don't wanna miss a thing
The track we're on might crash, oh what am I to do?
With the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast, only us, make it last
Till the sun's up
'Nother shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach a line, mark the end, but we'll
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up
And don't look back again
Carbonated love
